typeProperties.script:
parameters{
	APIToken as string (),
	DueDateRange as string (),
	GetTokenResponse as string (),
	LastUpdateDateRange as string (),
	MinDate as timestamp (),
	Today as timestamp ()
}

source(output(
		filingID as string,
		RowLevelHash as string
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	isolationLevel: 'READ_UNCOMMITTED',
	query: '<<Custom Command>>',
	format: 'query',
	staged:false) ~> FirmFlowOld	source(output(
		filingID as string,
		name as string,
		RowLevelHash as string
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	isolationLevel: 'READ_UNCOMMITTED',
	query: 'PROD.GoFileRoom_TrackingByWorkflow_InformationFields',
	format: 'query',
	staged:false) ~> InformationFieldsOld	source(output(
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false) ~> InputPlaceHolderJSONSource	source(output(
		filingID as string,
		RowLevelHash as string,
		step as string
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	isolationLevel: 'READ_UNCOMMITTED',
	query: 'PROD.GoFileRoom_TrackingByWorkflow_ResponsibleUserOrGroups',
	format: 'query',
	staged:false) ~> RepsonsibleUserGroupOld	source(output(
		filingID as string,
		RowLevelHash as string,
		step as string
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	isolationLevel: 'READ_UNCOMMITTED',
	query: 'PROD.GoFileRoom_TrackingByWorkflow_RoutingSummary',
	format: 'query',
	staged:false) ~> RoutingSummaryOld
InputPlaceHolderJSONSource derive(RowLevelHash = notConvertedhashalgo('SHA1', serviceType + totalDaysInProcess + picYesOrNo + clientName + year + pic + currentDueDate + daysBetweenRoutings + deliverables + assignedTo + folderID + drawerId + originalDueDate + extendedYesOrNo + sentOn + responsible + eFileYesOrNo + receivedOn + receivedFrom + periodEnd + accountable + dateExtended + workflow + engagementType + assignedOn + clientNumber + workflowDescription + priority + currentStep + sentTo + RowIndex + completedOn + workflowLastUpdated + routingNotes + daysAtStep + filingID + progress + assignedToYesOrNo + totalDaysAtStep + assignmentHistory + completedBy + ParentKeyField + status, ',', toString(null()))) ~> FirmFlowHash
InputPlaceHolderJSONSource derive(RowLevelHash = notConvertedhashalgo('SHA1', RowIndex + name + value + ParentKeyField, ',', toString(null()))) ~> InformationFieldsHash
InputPlaceHolderJSONSource derive(RowLevelHash = notConvertedhashalgo('SHA1', RowIndex + step + userOrGroup + ParentKeyField, ',', toString(null()))) ~> RepsonsibleUserGroupHash
InputPlaceHolderJSONSource derive(RowLevelHash = notConvertedhashalgo('SHA1', RowIndex + step + userOrGroup + ParentKeyField, ',', toString(null()))) ~> RoutingSummaryHash
FirmFlowOld,FirmFlowHash derive(filingID = filingID) ~> PlaceHolderFirmFlowDif
InformationFieldsOld,InformationFieldsHash derive(filingID = filingID) ~> PlaceHolderInformationFieldsDiff
RepsonsibleUserGroupHash,RepsonsibleUserGroupOld derive() ~> PlaceHolderRepsonsibleUserGroupDiff
RoutingSummaryHash,RoutingSummaryOld derive() ~> PlaceHolderRoutingSummaryDiff
PlaceHolderFirmFlowDif sink(input(
		serviceType as string,
		totalDaysInProcess as string,
		picYesOrNo as string,
		clientName as string,
		year as string,
		currentDueDate as string,
		daysBetweenRoutings as string,
		pic as string,
		deliverables as string,
		assignedTo as string,
		folderID as string,
		drawerId as string,
		originalDueDate as string,
		extendedYesOrNo as string,
		responsible as string,
		sentOn as string,
		eFileYesOrNo as string,
		receivedFrom as string,
		receivedOn as string,
		periodEnd as string,
		accountable as string,
		dateExtended as string,
		workflow as string,
		engagementType as string,
		assignedOn as string,
		clientNumber as string,
		priority as string,
		workflowDescription as string,
		currentStep as string,
		RowLevelHash as string,
		sentTo as string,
		_RowIndex as long,
		completedOn as string,
		workflowLastUpdated as string,
		daysAtStep as string,
		filingID as string,
		routingNotes as string,
		progress as string,
		assignedToYesOrNo as string,
		totalDaysAtStep as string,
		assignmentHistory as string,
		completedBy as string,
		_ParentKeyField as long,
		status as string
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	stagingSchemaName: 'dbo',
	saveOrder: 10000,
	insertable:true,
	deletable:false,
	upsertable:false,
	updateable:false,
	keys:[],
	mapColumn(
		serviceType,
		totalDaysInProcess,
		picYesOrNo,
		clientName,
		year,
		currentDueDate,
		daysBetweenRoutings,
		pic,
		deliverables,
		assignedTo,
		folderID,
		drawerId,
		originalDueDate,
		extendedYesOrNo,
		responsible,
		sentOn,
		eFileYesOrNo,
		receivedFrom,
		receivedOn,
		periodEnd,
		accountable,
		dateExtended,
		workflow,
		engagementType,
		assignedOn,
		clientNumber,
		priority,
		workflowDescription,
		currentStep,
		RowLevelHash,
		sentTo,
		_RowIndex,
		completedOn,
		workflowLastUpdated,
		daysAtStep,
		filingID,
		routingNotes,
		progress,
		assignedToYesOrNo,
		totalDaysAtStep,
		assignmentHistory,
		completedBy,
		_ParentKeyField,
		status)) ~> FirmFlowAdd
